calendar.matters:
Motion For Petitioner'S Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. PAUL SANDERSON-CIMINO, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid (tel: 415-354-6344) for Petitioner.
Atty. WAYNE SNODGRASS, Esq. of The City Attorney's Office (tel: 415-554-4675) for Respondents.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER ARENDT DEJOUNGE's Motion For Petitioner'S Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Reported by For The Record. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying the petition for writ of administrative mandate (see signed order for complete ruling). (302 RBU)*****

Motion For Petitioner'S Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Continued To Mar-14-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER ARENDT DEJOUNGE's Motion For Petitioner'S Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to March 14, 2023, on the court's motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
